appraisal_events.evidence: Robert salue avec des mouvements précipités et heurtés; l'officier est « calme, bienveillant, digne, impérial, représentant en somme tout l'opposé de Robert de Saint-Loup ».
appraisal_events.explanation: By a sustained contrast with the composed and majestic officer, the narrator presents Saint-Loup as nervous and less worthy in the military setting, which locally diminishes him.

status_effects.explanation: His feverish demeanor opposed to the officer's dignity makes him seem inferior in this scene.
